<!-- Thanks for contributing to scanipy! Please keep PRs focused and lean. -->

## Summary

<!--
What does this PR change, and why? Link any related issues (e.g. "Closes #123").
If behavior changes, say so plainly — scanipy values determinism and honest scope.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] `ruff check` is clean
- [ ] `ruff format --check` is clean
- [ ] `mypy src` is clean
- [ ] Any new detector ships **both** a true-positive and a true-negative fixture (P5)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] SPDX header (`# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0`) on any new Python source files
- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (e.g. `feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`)
